visualizations.title: Set of Integers
visualizations.description: Mathematical representation of integers extending to infinity in both directions.

steps.explanation: The symbol representing the set of all integers (from the German word 'Zahlen', meaning numbers).
Negative integers, which are less than zero.
Zero, which sits in the middle and is neutral.
Positive integers, which are greater than zero.

visualizations.title: Integers on the Number Line
visualizations.description: Visualize integers on a horizontal axis, showing positive numbers, negative numbers, zero, and comparisons.
